issues.description: Honesty verification shows 3 files claimed in files_modified but git status shows no changes to them this turn: src/fleet_memory/app.py, tests/unit/test_app_lifespan.py, .claude/task-plans/TASK-MEM-006-implementation-plan.md. The Player's implementation_notes states 'Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0' yet reports 4 files as modified.
issues.requirement: Accurate reporting of files modified in current turn
issues.suggestion: Only include files actually modified in THIS turn in files_modified. If no files were changed this turn (work was completed in Turn 1 or by a delegated agent), files_modified should be empty or contain only truly new changes. Consider adding a separate 'files_verified' field for verification-only activities.

issues.description: Turn 1 feedback explicitly asked to 'Clean up the report to list only files actually modified this turn' but Turn 2 report still contains the same reporting issues, triggering identical honesty discrepancies.
issues.suggestion: Review Turn 1 feedback and ensure the report accurately reflects only work done in Turn 2. If the implementation was already complete and no changes were needed this turn, the report should reflect that clearly.

issues.description: Plan audit failure appears to be a false positive: AC-004 contains a grep verification command, not a file path to create. The plan_audit interprets 'grep -rE "from nats|import nats|faststream" src/fleet_memory/store.py src/fleet_memory/embed.py src/fleet_memory/settings.py' as a missing file rather than a verification criterion.
issues.suggestion: Consider restructuring how verification-only commands are reported. AC-004 is checking existing files for NATS imports (a verification), not creating new files. The Player's completion_promise correctly identifies this as verification, but the plan_audit parsing needs clarification. Add a note in the completion_promise that this is a verification command checking existing service layer files.

issues.description: Gathering status is 'partial_gate_abort' — evidence collection was aborted before completion due to plan_audit failure. This means independent_tests (null) and other verification signals were not collected. Cannot independently confirm test results without complete evidence gathering.
issues.requirement: Complete evidence gathering for independent verification
issues.suggestion: Fix the reporting issues above to allow the plan_audit to pass and enable complete evidence gathering including independent test verification.

criteria_verification.notes: Tests passed according to evidence_bundle.tests (tests_passed: true). Player's completion_promise describes module-level broker/app exports with lifespan that enters async_store_context and exposes store via broker context. Import test verified. Cannot independently inspect file contents but passing tests provide supporting evidence.

Player describes test_lifespan_enters_and_exits_cleanly_with_fake_store using TestNatsBroker with mocked store context. Tests passed (tests_passed: true, tests_failed: 0). Evidence sufficient despite gathering abort.

Player describes test_startup_failure_with_unreachable_database with closed port 65432, timeout verification under 15s, and password leak check. Includes ASSUM-006 documentation about driver timeout behavior in test comment. Tests passed. Evidence sufficient.

Player claims grep command returned exit code 1 (non-zero), confirming no NATS/FastStream imports in service layer files (store.py, embed.py, settings.py). Player correctly identifies this as a verification criterion, not file creation. Plan audit false positive on this verification command does not invalidate the Player's claim. Tentatively verified based on Player's report, though independent verification blocked by gathering abort.
Evidence_bundle.tests shows tests_passed: true, tests_failed: 0. Player reports 4 tests passed in tests/unit/test_app_lifespan.py. Verified based on passing test signal.

Player claims ruff check and ruff format passed on modified files with zero errors. No independent verification available due to gathering abort, but no lint failures reported in test output. Tentatively verified.

rationale: The implementation appears complete based on passing tests (tests_passed: true, 4 tests passed), and all acceptance criteria have supporting evidence in the Player's completion_promises. However, providing feedback rather than approval due to: (1) honesty discrepancies showing files claimed as modified but not changed this turn, (2) Turn 1 feedback not addressed regarding accurate reporting, (3) gathering_status 'partial_gate_abort' preventing independent verification, and (4) plan_audit false positive on AC-004 that needs clarification. The core technical work appears done, but reporting accuracy must be fixed to enable complete evidence gathering and independent verification.
